LanguageData.VEE_IceAge.label: nuclear winter
LanguageData.VEE_IceAge.letterText:
High-altitude ash and radioactive soot have choked the sky, plunging the region into a nuclear winter.
Flora and fauna are suffering as biomes slide toward their colder counterparts. Food and fuel become scarce, and wasteland factions grow more desperate by the day.
It can last anywhere between a season and several years.
LanguageData.VEE_GlobalWarming.label: scorched summer
LanguageData.VEE_GlobalWarming.letterText:
Heat trapped beneath a filthy radioactive haze has driven local temperatures to punishing levels.
Flora and fauna are suffering as biomes drift toward their hotter counterparts. Water dries up, forage fails, and every faction in the wasteland feels the pressure.
It can last anywhere between a season and several years.
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicRain.label: temporal radstorm
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicRain.letterText:
An unstable old-world weather anomaly has churned a temporal radstorm into the atmosphere.
The storm lashes the land with strange glowing rain that twists flesh and time alike. Anyone left in the open will age at a frightening pace.
It can last anywhere between a season and several years.
LanguageData.VEE_LongNight.label: ashen skies
LanguageData.VEE_LongNight.letterText:
Orbital debris and black ash have smothered the sun, throwing the region into a long, ruinous twilight.
With the sky darkened and visibility ruined, wasteland factions take advantage of the confusion to raid, move, and settle scores under cover of gloom.
It can last anywhere between a season and several years.
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicBloom.label: mutant bloom
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicBloom.letterText:
A surge of unstable spores and irradiated pollen has reshaped local plant life almost overnight.
The sky glows with strange color while mutant flowers spread through fields, roads, and ruins alike. Colonists feel oddly uplifted, but the overgrowth can smother your crops if left unchecked.
It can last anywhere between a few days and a season.
LanguageData.VEE_SpaceBattle.label: vertibird dogfight
LanguageData.VEE_SpaceBattle.letterText: Several vertibirds and old-world gunships have engaged in a running fight above the region. Missed shots and burning debris can impact the ground and start fires.
LanguageData.VEE_AnimalPodCrash.label: animal cargo bot crash
LanguageData.VEE_ShuttleCrash.label: vertibird crash
LanguageData.VEE_Cargopodsweapons.label: cargo bots (weapons)
LanguageData.VEE_Cargopodsapparel.label: cargo bots (apparel)
LanguageData.GauranlenPodSpawn.label: Treefather pod sprouting
LanguageData.GauranlenPodSpawn.letterText: A new Treefather pod has sprouted, ready to grow a new treeminder. Tend to it carefully to ensure a healthy symbiote.
LanguageData.VFED_GiveQuest_ChasedDeserter.label: Whitespring defector
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialPatrol.label: Whitespring patrol
LanguageData.VFED_PropagandaDrop.label: Whitespring propaganda drop
LanguageData.VFED_Raid_Absolver.label: light trooper raid
LanguageData.VFEE_GiveQuest_EndGame_Stellarch.label: presidential succession
LanguageData.GiveQuest_EndGame_RoyalAscent.label: Enclave ascent
LanguageData.GiveQuest_Intro_Wimp.label: Whitespring agent
LanguageData.WandererJoinAbasia.label: shell shock join
LanguageData.Disease_Abasia.label: shell shock
